questions.question: Why is the ADF test required in statistical arbitrage?
options: It confirms that the strategy will remain profitable in live markets.
It helps test whether the spread is stationary, giving statistical evidence beyond just a backtest.
It identifies the most volatile asset in the pair.
It measures whether both stocks have high trading volume.

questions.question: What was the main reason for the fallout of LTCM?
options: Failure to use any quantitative models.
Avoidance of leverage in portfolio construction.
